title: angelica cartilaginomarginata var. distans
intro: Angelica cartilaginomarginata var. distans, also known as a variant of the Angelica plant, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Angelica cartilaginomarginata var. distans include its potential to lower fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
